title: Gift Card Options
description: What types of gift cards are available, how can I buy them, and what are the terms for using them?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information about gift cards, including the varieties (physical vs. electronic, retailer‑specific vs. general‑purpose), purchasing methods (online ordering, email delivery, in‑store), customization options (amount, design, personal message), and usage constraints (expiration dates, balance carry‑over, applicable merchants, redemption process). Relevant documents should describe gift‑card offerings, ordering steps, validation rules, and any promotional or fee details. Documents that only mention unrelated apps, game cards, or unrelated marketing text are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tagine
description: Looking for authentic recipes and detailed cooking instructions for a traditional lamb tagine.
narrative: The user intends to find a complete lamb tagine recipe, including ingredient quantities, spice blends, vegetable additions, step‑by‑step preparation and cooking methods, cooking times, and tips for achieving authentic flavor. Relevant documents should provide thorough culinary guidance, variations, and possibly serving or nutritional information. Content unrelated to cooking—such as real estate listings, restaurant reservations, or unrelated travel narratives—is not relevant.

title: Lotus Car Overview
description: What Lotus automobile models are available, what are their key specifications, and where can they be found for sale?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about Lotus cars, including model names (e.g., Evora, Exige), performance specs, recent releases, collaborations, pricing, and purchasing options. Relevant documents should discuss Lotus vehicles, their technical details, market announcements, or listings for Lotus cars. Documents that do not mention Lotus automobiles or focus on unrelated brands or topics are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes
description: What is a traditional recipe and preparation method for paupiettes de veau?
narrative: The user wants a complete cooking guide for veal paupiettes, including ingredients, step‑by‑step instructions, cooking times, and any useful tips or variations. Relevant documents are those that provide a paupiette recipe (especially veal‑based or using veal stock) with detailed preparation steps. Documents that only list menus, restaurant information, unrelated recipes, or non‑culinary content are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What methods and products can I use to protect my car’s interior and exterior from sun‑induced heat and UV damage?
narrative: The user is looking for practical ways to shield a vehicle from the harmful effects of sunlight, including reducing cabin temperature, blocking UV rays, and preventing fading or degradation of seats, dashboards, upholstery, and paint. Relevant documents are those that discuss tinted or athermal windshields, sun‑visors, window films, interior sun shades, protective seat covers, anti‑skid seat protectors that also preserve seat condition, and any advice on vehicle colour or glazing that mitigates solar heating. Documents that only talk about unrelated hotels, motorcycle covers, or general product listings without any reference to sun protection for cars are not relevant.

title: Small Watercraft
description: What are the definitions, types, and typical uses of small vessels such as personal boats or modest‑size craft?
narrative: The user is seeking information about small vessels – generally modest‑size watercraft used for personal, recreational, or specialized purposes. Relevant material should describe what constitutes a small vessel (size, tonnage, crew capacity), give examples (e.g., small sailing boats like Tara Tari, small fishing or utility boats), discuss design features, typical activities, and any cultural or metaphoric references that treat a 'small vessel' as a unit or spiritual object. Documents focusing on large naval ships, mine‑hunter specifications, rowing techniques, or unrelated medical/space topics are not relevant.

title: Passenger Car Listings
description: What passenger car advertisements are available for sale?
narrative: The user is looking for classified listings of passenger cars that are being offered for purchase. Relevant documents should contain ads or catalogs that describe individual passenger vehicles (make, model, year, mileage, price, location, etc.). Materials that only discuss car rentals, commercial vans, tax regulations, or non‑sale information are not relevant.

title: War School Impact
description: What are the effects of armed conflict on schools and how are displaced children educated during war?
narrative: The user seeks information about the intersection of war and education, looking for descriptions of how schools operate in conflict zones, how refugee or war‑affected children are integrated into regular schooling, and any policies or programs created to support them. Relevant documents should discuss real‑world cases (e.g., Ukrainian children attending French schools as refugees), governmental or institutional responses to war‑induced displacement, and metaphorical uses of "war" in the context of school environments. Documents that merely mention war or schools without linking the two, or that focus on unrelated historical or biographical topics, are not relevant.

title: Option Right Unemployment
description: What are the eligibility criteria, conditions and procedures for exercising the "right of option" to receive unemployment benefits through Pôle emploi?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the "right of option" (the option to claim unemployment benefits) as administered by Pôle emploi, including which categories of workers (e.g., resigning employees, self‑employed, precarious workers) are entitled, the statutory conditions (minimum work periods, income thresholds, project requirements), the benefits payable, and any recent reforms affecting these rights. Relevant documents are those that describe the 2019/2021 unemployment insurance reforms, the opening of unemployment rights to resigning employees and the self‑employed, the procedural steps for registration and coaching, and the specific legal articles governing the right of option. Documents that merely list unrelated forms, attestations, or unrelated administrative procedures are not relevant.

title: AXA Client Space
description: How do I access or set up my AXA client (online) space?
narrative: The user is looking for instructions on using AXA’s online client portal – how to create an account, log in, recover a forgotten password or code, and navigate the client area. Relevant information includes step‑by‑step guides for AXA Bank’s customer space, AXA recruitment candidate space, and any AXA‑specific portal (e.g., MyAXA) that explains account creation, login procedures, and password recovery. Documents that describe Veolia or unrelated insurance brokers are not relevant.

title: Best EV
description: Which electric car is considered the best overall?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information to identify the top-performing electric vehicle, looking for comparisons, rankings, and discussion of key criteria such as range, price, performance, efficiency, charging infrastructure, and overall value. Relevant documents should contain expert analysis, model recommendations, or detailed arguments that help evaluate and rank electric cars. Materials that only provide generic images, promotional leasing offers, or unrelated automotive news are not relevant.

title: Late Blight
description: What are effective methods to manage and prevent late blight in potato crops?
narrative: The user wants detailed information about late blight (Phytophthora infestans) on potatoes, including disease symptoms, life cycle, cultural and chemical control measures, and potato varieties that are resistant to late blight. Relevant material should describe blight‑resistant cultivars, recommended sanitation and crop‑rotation practices, fungicide options, and integrated pest‑management strategies. Documents that only discuss potato recipes, unrelated garden topics, or other plant diseases are not relevant.

title: Heaven to Earth
description: What is the meaning and possible interpretation of the phrase “from heaven to dusky monic earth”?
narrative: The user is looking for an explanation of this poetic expression, seeking insight into how the terms ‘heaven’ and ‘dusky monic earth’ are used metaphorically or spiritually. Relevant material includes poetry and spiritual writings that discuss moving from a celestial or higher consciousness state to a grounded, earthly existence, describing the contrast and connection between heavenly and earthly realms. Documents that explore cosmic consciousness, new earth concepts, and poetic imagery of heaven and earth are considered relevant, while unrelated game forums, technical manuals, or purely doctrinal Bible passages are not.

title: Mad Space History
description: What are the odd, controversial, or “mad” episodes and stories in the history of space exploration?
narrative: The user seeks information about the unconventional, bizarre, or little‑known aspects of space history—e.g., strange missions, eccentric anecdotes, early animal flights like Laïka, speculative or fictional chronicles, and chaotic events that stand out from standard technical accounts. Relevant documents describe these peculiar or sensational narratives of space exploration, while ordinary technical reports, purely scientific overviews, or unrelated content are not relevant.

title: Legacy Office
description: What is the Legacy Office, its purpose, and where can I find information about its activities?
narrative: The user is looking for a specific entity called the "Legacy Office" – likely a governmental, institutional, or corporate department that handles legacy-related matters (e.g., historical records, asset management, or program continuity). Relevant documents should explicitly mention the Legacy Office, describe its role, responsibilities, location, history, or provide contact information. Sources that only contain unrelated mentions of "legacy" in other contexts (e.g., film titles, distillery news, company registries) are not relevant.

title: Prevail Meaning
description: What is the definition of “to prevail” and how is it used in inspirational, religious, or motivational contexts?
narrative: The user is looking for a clear explanation of the verb “prevail,” including its definition, synonyms, and example usages that convey winning, overcoming, or enduring. Relevant material includes quotations and passages where the word appears in statements about war, peace, faith, and personal triumph (e.g., “peace and humanity must prevail,” biblical verses about the LORD’s purpose prevailing, and public calls to “win” or “prevail”). Documents that merely discuss unrelated sports events, handball clubs, or archaeology are not relevant.

title: Uncharted Territory
description: What is the TV program that takes people to unknown places, often described as “go to uncharted territory”?
narrative: The user wants information about the French television series that explores remote or unknown locations, including its title, premise, host, broadcast schedule, episode highlights, and where to watch it. Relevant documents describe the show “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu,” its concept of taking personalities to unfamiliar destinations, the presenter Frédéric Lopez, episode examples, and airing details on France 2/France 5. Documents that merely mention unrelated topics (e.g., car sales, political news, product testing) are not relevant.

title: Potato Écrasé Recipe
description: How can I make French‑style crushed (écrasé) potatoes?
narrative: The user is looking for a straightforward recipe for "pommes de terre écrasées" – potatoes that are boiled, lightly smashed, and roasted or fried with oil, herbs, salt and pepper. Relevant documents should provide a cooking method that includes boiling potatoes, draining, gently crushing them, seasoning, and finishing in a pan or oven, possibly with variations. Sources that only discuss generic cooking times, unrelated software, or non‑culinary topics are not relevant.

title: Venue Spaces
description: What venues or rentable spaces named “Espace” are available in Paris for meetings, conferences, or leisure activities?
narrative: The user is looking for locations in Paris that are identified by the word “Espace,” either as a conference venue (e.g., Espace Charenton) or as a leisure facility offering themed rentable rooms/spaces (sauna, spa, etc.). Relevant documents must mention the name “Espace,” be situated in Paris, and provide details about the type of space, services, capacity, or event‑related information. Documents that only list generic hotel rooms, unrelated function‑space inventories, or venues outside Paris are not relevant.

title: Energy Supplier Comparison
description: What are the main energy suppliers in France, their current offers, promotions, and customer feedback?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of French energy suppliers, including a list of major providers, details of their electricity and gas tariffs, green or renewable options, promotional codes, and real‑world customer reviews. title: Kia Vehicle Info
description: What are the specifications, model line‑ups, and key features of Kia cars?
narrative: The user is looking for general information about Kia automobiles, including model overviews, technical specifications, production years, and notable variants such as the Kia Sportage and Kia Bongo. Relevant documents provide factual details, fact sheets, and descriptive summaries of Kia models. Documents that are merely sales listings, advertisements, or unrelated parts catalogs do not satisfy the information need.

title: Gallic Series
description: What is the animated series called “The Gallic” that features Idéfix from Asterix?
narrative: The user wants information about a TV animation titled “The Gallic,” which tells the back‑story of Idéfix, the dog companion of Obelix in the Asterix universe. Documents that merely discuss Asterix comics, related exhibitions, or any other Gallic‑related subjects (e.g., historical reenactment groups, Gallic musical instruments) are not relevant.

title: Faro Car Rental
description: What car rental options, agencies, and rates are available at Faro Airport?

description: What car rental services are available in Nantes, including luxury options and pricing?

title: Potato Diseases
description: What diseases affect potatoes (both the plant and human health) and how can they be recognized and managed?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information on illnesses related to potatoes, including plant pathogens (e.g., late blight, downy mildew, Phytophthora infestans) and human health hazards (e.g., glycoalkaloid poisoning from green or sprouted potatoes). Relevant documents should describe specific potato diseases, their symptoms, causes, and control measures, as well as the toxicity of potato parts to humans. Documents that only discuss general cultivation tips, varieties, recipes, or commercial sales without disease or toxicity details are not relevant.

title: Beaujolais Wine
description: What are the key characteristics, appellations, and food pairings of Beaujolais wines?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about Beaujolais wine, including its major crus (e.g., Moulin‑à‑Vent), grape varieties, winemaking techniques, tasting notes, aging potential, and recommended food pairings. title: Boat Shoes

narrative: The user is interested in shoes intended for boating activities, such as deck shoes, marine shoes, or other footwear that is water‑resistant, non‑slip, and suitable for wet deck surfaces. title: Renault Espace
description: What are the specifications, features, and history of the Renault Espace MPV?

title: Lincoln Car Specs

description: Find information about concerts taking place in Bordeaux, including dates, venues, and performing artists.
narrative: The user is looking for listings of live music events in Bordeaux, France. title: Energy Mediation
description: What is an energy mediator and how does it help manage or reduce energy consumption?
narrative: The user is looking for information about the concept of an "energy mediator" – a device, system, or role that intermediates energy flows to improve efficiency. Relevant documents should describe technologies or frameworks that act as mediators, such as energy management systems (EMS), lighting control solutions, energy‑saving audits, and other mechanisms that coordinate or optimize energy use in buildings or enterprises. Documents that only discuss legal, cultural, or real‑estate mediation, or that do not address energy‑related mediation, are not relevant.

title: Office Setup
description: What desktop computers and ergonomic chairs are recommended for equipping a corporate office?
narrative: The user is looking for information on hardware and furniture to furnish a workplace: high‑performance desktop PCs suitable for professional tasks and ergonomic office chairs that support good posture. Relevant documents should describe Intel‑based desktop workstations, their specifications, and ergonomic chair models, while ignoring software‑only offerings (e.g., Microsoft Office 365), office supply catalogs, rental listings, and unrelated forum notices.

title: Silver Photography
description: What are the techniques, equipment, and formats used in traditional silver (black‑and‑white) photography?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about silver‑based photographic processes, including how silver photographs are made, the darkroom equipment required, available workshops or labs for developing silver prints, and the standard print formats used for silver (argentic) images. Relevant documents describe a silver‑photo laboratory with enlargers, trays, chemicals, and workshops, as well as a guide to traditional silver print dimensions (e.g., 10×15 cm, 13×18 cm). title: Leek Quiche Recipe
description: What is a good recipe for making a leek quiche?
narrative: The user wants detailed instructions to prepare a quiche that features leeks as a primary ingredient. title: Free Car Games
description: What are some free online car games that can be played directly in a web browser without downloading?
narrative: The user wants a list of web‑based car games that are completely free, require no installation, and cover sub‑genres like racing, stunt driving, and car simulations. Relevant documents should describe or link to such browser games, mention they are playable for free, and provide enough detail to identify the game (title, genre, basic gameplay). title: Mobility Employment Aid
description: What financial assistance is available to job seekers in France to support both their work‑related mobility and training?
narrative: The user is looking for information on employment‑related mobility aid – a benefit that helps job seekers cover travel or relocation costs while they undertake vocational training or return to work. Relevant documents should describe the mobility aid offered by employment agencies (e.g., Pôle emploi), its eligibility criteria (e.g., registered job seeker, recipient of specific contracts), the amount or limits of the allowance, how it can be combined with training aids such as the Individual Training Assistance (AIF), and the application procedure. title: Oil Lamp Types
description: What styles, materials, and specifications are available for oil lamps?
narrative: The user is looking for commercial and descriptive information about oil lamps, including their designs, colors, dimensions, fuel type, and purchasing details. Materials such as brass, oil‑blue finishes, decorative motifs, and size measurements are considered relevant, while forum discussions about alternative lighting solutions or unrelated technical debates are not.

title: Madeira Car Rental
description: What car rental companies operate in Madeira and what are the rates, vehicle options, and booking conditions for renting a car on the island?

title: New Potatoes Overview
description: What are new potatoes and how can they be prepared, cultivated, or used?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of new potatoes, covering their botanical characteristics, popular varieties, cooking methods and recipes, and horticultural guidance for planting and harvesting. Relevant material includes descriptions of new‑potato varieties, tips for cooking or serving new potatoes, and advice on sowing, growing, and harvesting them. title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What are the eligibility requirements, amount, and payment schedule for the French government’s return‑to‑work bonus offered to long‑term job‑seekers?
narrative: The user is seeking official details about the specific €1,000 return‑to‑work (or “bonus‑reprise d’activité”) scheme announced by the French Ministry of Labour, including who qualifies (e.g., duration of unemployment, training contracts, sector focus), how the €800 million fund is allocated, and how the bonus is paid in two installments. Relevant documents describe this bonus, its purpose, conditions, and implementation; documents about unrelated activity or employment bonuses, tax matters, or general labour law are not relevant.
